# glm - OpenGL Mathematics

This is a placeholder for the GLM library.

## Installation

GLM should be initialized as a git submodule:

```bash
git submodule update --init --recursive
```

Or clone manually:

```bash
git clone --depth 1 https://github.com/g-truc/glm.git extern/glm
```

## Note

GLM is a header-only library. No compilation is required - just include the headers.
CMake adds the glm directory to the include paths automatically.
